PluginData.Author: Revels
PluginData.Tooltip: Automatically removes Silicone ingots from your ship.
PluginData.Description: When enabled, Silicone ingots will automatically be deleted from your ships cargo. Enable by either using the button at the bottom of a ship drills terminal page, or by adding the toggle action to your toolbar. Function will stay on until you toggle it back off, or release control of your ship. *NEW* Added ice as another material to remove.
